search:azure-cosmosdb-spring-data:azure.content:
- **CLI Commands**:
  - `az cosmosdb create --name <your_cosmos_db_name> --resource-group <your_resource_group> --kind GlobalDocumentDB`
  - `az cosmosdb update --name <your_cosmos_db_name> --resource-group <your_resource_group> --enable-public-network true`

- **Latest Versions**:
  - Spring Boot: 3.1.4
  - Spring Data CosmosDB: 2025.1.0

- **Key Config Options**:
  - `spring.data.cosmosdb.uri`: Your Cosmos DB URI.
  - `spring.data.cosmosdb.key`: Your Cosmos DB key.
  - `spring.data.cosmosdb.database`: Your database name.
  - `spring.data.cosmosdb.collection`: Your collection name.

- **CLI Commands**:
  - `az cosmosdb create --name <cosmos-db-name> --resource-group <resource-group-name>`
  - `az cosmosdb update --name <cosmos-db-name> --resource-group <resource-group-name> --enable-multiple-write-locations true`

- **Latest Versions**:
  - Spring Boot: 3.0.x
  - Azure Cosmos DB SDK for Java: 4.12.0

- **Key Config Options**:
  - `spring.data.cosmosdb.uri`: Your Cosmos DB URI.
  - `spring.data.cosmosdb.key`: Your Cosmos DB key.
  - `spring.data.cosmosdb.database`: The name of your database.
  - `spring.data.cosmosdb.collection`: The name of your collection.

search:azure-cosmosdb-spring-data:spring.content:
- **CLI Commands**:
  - `az cosmosdb create --name <cosmos-db-name> --resource-group <resource-group-name>`
  - `docker run -d -p 8080:8080 --name spring-boot-app <spring-boot-image>`
  - `mvn clean install`

- **Latest Versions**:
  - Spring Boot: 3.1.4
  - Azure CosmosDB Java SDK: 4.29.0

- **Key Config Options**:
  - `spring.data.cosmosdb.uri`: Your Cosmos DB URI.
  - `spring.data.cosmosdb.key`: Your Cosmos DB key.
  - `spring.data.cosmosdb.database`: Your database name.
  - `spring.data.cosmosdb.collection`: Your collection name.
